clues: The company's email server is unable to send emails to a specific external domain.
Emails to other domains are delivered without issues.
The email logs show 'Connection timed out' when attempting to connect to the recipient's mail server.
The recipient's domain mail exchanger (MX) record resolves correctly in DNS.
Pinging the recipient's mail server from the email server shows high packet loss.
